economic_notes: Four commercial partnerships accounted for by consolidation value method: Groupe Umek SEC (crab commercialization, 23.33% ownership), Pecheries Nikan SEC (crab fishing, 50%, winding down), Les Pecheries Nitshimau SENC (crab fishing, 50%), Station Uapishka SENC (resort/lodging, 51%). Combined revenues of $18.6M and surplus of $1.5M. Nation received $30.3M federal settlement in 2017-18 placed as investments (strategic finance). Particular claims settlement of $1.98M received in 1998 from AANDC re: electrical transmission lines.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). French-language financial statements from Quebec. Four commercial partnerships (Groupe Umek, Pecheries Nikan, Pecheries Nitshimau, Station Uapishka) accounted for by consolidation value method per SP 3060, not fully consolidated. SAC funding includes global contribution $23.5M, fixed contributions $11.6M, pre-established/flexible $0.5M totaling ~$35.6M. CDRHPNQ contribution $1.18M and Sécurité publique Québec $748K included in government transfers. Institut Tshakapesh revenue $47,277 appears only in current year (no prior). Deferred revenue includes SAC deferred contributions $7.9M and other $1.27M. Current liabilities include bank overdraft/line of credit $12.97M + operating debts $5.83M + deferred contributions $9.19M. SCHL reserve funds noted as having been used for other purposes due to liquidity issues. No schedule of remuneration provided. The 'autres éléments' of $2,326,637 represents non-cash items reconciliation including amortization offset by capitalization and debt repayment - not a one-time item. Prior year figures show significant deficit of $8.7M in operations before other elements.
